name: Dashboard Automation Step 11 - Branch Guardrails and Rollback Drill

parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "task_id": "{{ $json.task_id || ('task-' + Date.now()) }}",
  "objective": "{{ $json.objective || 'Implement approved dashboard scope incrementally' }}",
  "workspace_path": "{{ $json.workspace_path || '/opt/homebrew/var/www/TKIF_scholarship' }}",
  "scope_files": {{ $json.scope_files || ['public/views/dashboard.php','public/index.php','app/lib/profile.php','sql/schema.sql'] }},
  "constraints": {{ $json.constraints || [
    'Do not rebuild system',
    'Keep existing scholarship functionality',
    'No AI analytics/recommendations',
    'No finance/revenue/accounting features',
    'Use existing routes, roles, and design system'
  ] }},
  "acceptance_criteria": {{ $json.acceptance_criteria || [
    'Role-based visibility preserved',
    'No hardcoded KPI values',
    'Empty states are safe',
    'Exports remain permission-gated'
  ] }}
}

parameters.command:
=WORKSPACE='{{$json.workspace_path}}'
if [ ! -d "$WORKSPACE" ]; then
  echo '{"error":"workspace_not_found"}'
  exit 1
fi
cd "$WORKSPACE"
BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')
STATUS=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -n 20 | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
FILES=$(find app public sql -type f | head -n 200 | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
printf '{"workspace":"%s","branch":"%s","status":"%s","files":"%s"}\n' "$WORKSPACE" "$BRANCH" "$STATUS" "$FILES"

=WORKSPACE='{{$json.workspace_path}}'
TASK='{{$json.task_id}}'
STAMP='{{$json.apply_stamp}}'
PATCH_B64='{{$json.patch_b64}}'
AUDIT_DIR="$WORKSPACE/n8n/workflows/audit"
PATCH_FILE="$AUDIT_DIR/patch_${TASK}_${STAMP}.diff"
ROLLBACK_FILE="$AUDIT_DIR/rollback_${TASK}_${STAMP}.diff"
AUDIT_LOG="$AUDIT_DIR/apply_audit.log"

mkdir -p "$AUDIT_DIR"
if [ ! -d "$WORKSPACE" ]; then
  echo '{"apply_ok":false,"error":"workspace_not_found"}'
  exit 0
fi

cd "$WORKSPACE"
# Create rollback artifact from current working tree state
git --no-pager diff > "$ROLLBACK_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

# Decode patch payload
printf '%s' "$PATCH_B64" | base64 --decode > "$PATCH_FILE" 2>/dev/null
if [ ! -s "$PATCH_FILE" ]; then
  printf '{"apply_ok":false,"error":"empty_patch","rollback_file":"%s"}\n' "$ROLLBACK_FILE"
  exit 0
fi

# Preflight check first
if ! git apply --check "$PATCH_FILE" 2>/tmp/n8n_apply_err.txt; then
  ERR=$(cat /tmp/n8n_apply_err.txt | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
  printf '{"apply_ok":false,"error":"apply_check_failed","details":"%s","rollback_file":"%s","patch_file":"%s"}\n' "$ERR" "$ROLLBACK_FILE" "$PATCH_FILE"
  exit 0
fi

# Apply patch
if ! git apply "$PATCH_FILE" 2>/tmp/n8n_apply_err2.txt; then
  ERR=$(cat /tmp/n8n_apply_err2.txt | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
  printf '{"apply_ok":false,"error":"apply_failed","details":"%s","rollback_file":"%s","patch_file":"%s"}\n' "$ERR" "$ROLLBACK_FILE" "$PATCH_FILE"
  exit 0
fi

CHANGED=$(git status --short | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
TS=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
printf '{"timestamp":"%s","task_id":"%s","patch_file":"%s","rollback_file":"%s","changed":"%s"}\n' "$TS" "$TASK" "$PATCH_FILE" "$ROLLBACK_FILE" "$CHANGED" >> "$AUDIT_LOG"
printf '{"apply_ok":true,"patch_file":"%s","rollback_file":"%s","audit_log":"%s","changed":"%s"}\n' "$PATCH_FILE" "$ROLLBACK_FILE" "$AUDIT_LOG" "$CHANGED"

parameters.jsCode: let apply = {}; try { apply = JSON.parse($json.stdout || '{}'); } catch (e) { apply = { apply_ok: false, parse_error: String(e) }; } const meta = $('Build Apply Metadata').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { ...meta, ...apply } }];

parameters.command:
=WORKSPACE='{{$json.workspace_path}}'
if [ ! -d "$WORKSPACE" ]; then
  printf '{"verify_ok":false,"error":"workspace_not_found"}\n'
  exit 0
fi
cd "$WORKSPACE"
VERIFY_FAIL=0
VERIFY_LOG=''
CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only | tr '\n' ' ')
for f in $(git diff --name-only); do
  case "$f" in
    *.php)
      OUT=$(php -l "$f" 2>&1)
      CODE=$?
      if [ $CODE -ne 0 ]; then
        VERIFY_FAIL=1
        VERIFY_LOG="$VERIFY_LOG\n[php-lint-fail] $f :: $OUT"
      fi
      ;;
  esac
done
if [ -x scripts/acceptance_smoke.sh ] && [ "\${SKIP_SMOKE:-0}" != "1" ]; then
  SMOKE_OUT=$(bash scripts/acceptance_smoke.sh http://localhost/TKIF_scholarship 2>&1)
  SMOKE_CODE=$?
  if [ $SMOKE_CODE -ne 0 ]; then
    VERIFY_FAIL=1
    VERIFY_LOG="$VERIFY_LOG\n[smoke-fail] $SMOKE_OUT"
  fi
fi
if [ $VERIFY_FAIL -ne 0 ]; then
  LOG=$(printf '%s' "$VERIFY_LOG" | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
  CH=$(printf '%s' "$CHANGED" | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
  printf '{"verify_ok":false,"changed":"%s","details":"%s"}\n' "$CH" "$LOG"
  exit 0
fi
CH=$(printf '%s' "$CHANGED" | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
printf '{"verify_ok":true,"changed":"%s"}\n' "$CH"

=WORKSPACE='{{$json.workspace_path}}'
PATCH_FILE='{{$json.patch_file || ''}}'
AUDIT_LOG='{{$json.audit_log || ''}}'
TASK='{{$json.task_id || 'unknown-task'}}'
if [ ! -d "$WORKSPACE" ]; then
  printf '{"rollback_ok":false,"error":"workspace_not_found"}\n'
  exit 0
fi
cd "$WORKSPACE"
if [ -z "$PATCH_FILE" ] || [ ! -f "$PATCH_FILE" ]; then
  printf '{"rollback_ok":false,"error":"patch_file_missing"}\n'
  exit 0
fi
if git apply -R "$PATCH_FILE" 2>/tmp/n8n_rollback_err.txt; then
  TS=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
  if [ -n "$AUDIT_LOG" ]; then
    printf '{"timestamp":"%s","task_id":"%s","rollback":"success","patch_file":"%s"}\n' "$TS" "$TASK" "$PATCH_FILE" >> "$AUDIT_LOG"
  fi
  printf '{"rollback_ok":true,"patch_file":"%s"}\n' "$PATCH_FILE"
else
  ERR=$(cat /tmp/n8n_rollback_err.txt | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
  printf '{"rollback_ok":false,"error":"rollback_failed","details":"%s"}\n' "$ERR"
fi

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "mode": "register_deploy",
  "task_id": $json.task_id || $("Build Release Checklist").first().json.task_id,
  "patch_file": $json.patch_file || $("Build Release Checklist").first().json.patch_file || "",
  "changed_files": $json.changed_files || $("Build Release Checklist").first().json.changed_files || [],
  "release_checklist": $("Build Release Checklist").first().json.release_checklist || []
}

parameters.jsCode: const base = $('UI Passed?').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { ...base, snapshot_stage: 'pre_apply', snapshot_branch: $env.DASHBOARD_AUTOMATION_BRANCH || '', snapshot_remote: $env.DASHBOARD_AUTOMATION_REMOTE || 'origin' } }];

parameters.command:
=WORKSPACE='{{$json.workspace_path || '/opt/homebrew/var/www/TKIF_scholarship'}}'
TASK='{{$json.task_id || 'task-' + Date.now()}}'
STAGE='{{$json.snapshot_stage || 'pre_approval'}}'
BRANCH='{{$json.snapshot_branch || ''}}'
REMOTE='{{$json.snapshot_remote || 'origin'}}'
if [ ! -d "$WORKSPACE" ]; then
  printf '{"snapshot_ok":false,"error":"workspace_not_found","stage":"%s"}\n' "$STAGE"
  exit 0
fi
cd "$WORKSPACE"
if [ -n "$BRANCH" ]; then
  git checkout "$BRANCH" >/tmp/n8n_git_checkout.txt 2>&1 || true
fi
CHANGES=$(git status --porcelain)
if [ -z "$CHANGES" ]; then
  CUR=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '')
  SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '')
  printf '{"snapshot_ok":true,"stage":"%s","skipped":true,"reason":"no_changes","branch":"%s","sha":"%s"}\n' "$STAGE" "$CUR" "$SHA"
  exit 0
fi
git add -A >/tmp/n8n_git_add.txt 2>&1
if ! git commit -m "[n8n:$TASK] checkpoint before $STAGE approval" >/tmp/n8n_git_commit.txt 2>&1; then
  COMMIT_ERR=$(cat /tmp/n8n_git_commit.txt | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
  printf '{"snapshot_ok":false,"stage":"%s","error":"commit_failed","details":"%s"}\n' "$STAGE" "$COMMIT_ERR"
  exit 0
fi
CUR=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '')
SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '')
if [ -n "$CUR" ] && [ -n "$REMOTE" ]; then
  if git push "$REMOTE" "$CUR" >/tmp/n8n_git_push.txt 2>&1; then
    printf '{"snapshot_ok":true,"stage":"%s","branch":"%s","sha":"%s","push_ok":true}\n' "$STAGE" "$CUR" "$SHA"
  else
    PUSH_ERR=$(cat /tmp/n8n_git_push.txt | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
    printf '{"snapshot_ok":false,"stage":"%s","error":"push_failed","branch":"%s","sha":"%s","details":"%s"}\n' "$STAGE" "$CUR" "$SHA" "$PUSH_ERR"
  fi
else
  printf '{"snapshot_ok":false,"stage":"%s","error":"branch_or_remote_missing"}\n' "$STAGE"
fi

parameters.jsCode: const base = $('Build Release Checklist').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { ...base, snapshot_stage: 'pre_deploy', snapshot_branch: $env.DASHBOARD_AUTOMATION_BRANCH || '', snapshot_remote: $env.DASHBOARD_AUTOMATION_REMOTE || 'origin' } }];

nodes.name: Commit Push Snapshot Before Monitor Approval

parameters.command:
=WORKSPACE='{{$json.workspace_path || '/opt/homebrew/var/www/TKIF_scholarship'}}'
TASK='{{$json.task_id || 'task-' + Date.now()}}'
STAGE='{{$json.snapshot_stage || 'pre_approval'}}'
BRANCH='{{$json.snapshot_branch || ''}}'
REMOTE='{{$json.snapshot_remote || 'origin'}}'
if [ ! -d "$WORKSPACE" ]; then

  exit 0

if [ -n "$BRANCH" ]; then

  exit 0

if ! git commit -m "[n8n:$TASK] checkpoint before $STAGE approval" >/tmp/n8n_git_commit.txt 2>&1; then

  exit 0

  else
    PUSH_ERR=$(cat /tmp/n8n_git_push.txt | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')

parameters.jsCode: const m = $('Build Monitoring Registration').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { ...m, required_branch: $env.DASHBOARD_AUTOMATION_BRANCH || '' } }];

parameters.command:
=WORKSPACE='{{$json.workspace_path || '/opt/homebrew/var/www/TKIF_scholarship'}}'
REQUIRED='{{$json.required_branch || ''}}'
if [ ! -d "$WORKSPACE" ]; then
  printf '{"guard_ok":false,"error":"workspace_not_found"}\n'
  exit 0
fi
cd "$WORKSPACE"
CUR=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '')
if [ -z "$CUR" ]; then
  printf '{"guard_ok":false,"error":"no_branch_detected"}\n'
  exit 0
fi
if [ "$CUR" = "main" ] || [ "$CUR" = "master" ]; then
  printf '{"guard_ok":false,"error":"protected_branch_direct_run","branch":"%s"}\n' "$CUR"
  exit 0
fi
if [ -n "$REQUIRED" ] && [ "$CUR" != "$REQUIRED" ]; then
  printf '{"guard_ok":false,"error":"branch_mismatch","branch":"%s","required":"%s"}\n' "$CUR" "$REQUIRED"
  exit 0
fi
printf '{"guard_ok":true,"branch":"%s"}\n' "$CUR"

parameters.jsCode: const hook = $('Run App Deploy Hook').first().json || {}; const r = hook.result || {}; return [{ json: { workspace_path: '/opt/homebrew/var/www/TKIF_scholarship', patch_file: r.patch_file || '', task_id: r.task_id || ('task-' + Date.now()) } }];

parameters.command:
=WORKSPACE='{{$json.workspace_path || '/opt/homebrew/var/www/TKIF_scholarship'}}'
PATCH_FILE='{{$json.patch_file || ''}}'
if [ ! -d "$WORKSPACE" ]; then
  printf '{"drill_ok":false,"error":"workspace_not_found"}\n'
  exit 0
fi
cd "$WORKSPACE"
if [ -z "$PATCH_FILE" ] || [ ! -f "$PATCH_FILE" ]; then
  printf '{"drill_ok":false,"error":"patch_file_missing"}\n'
  exit 0
fi
if git apply -R --check "$PATCH_FILE" >/tmp/n8n_rb_check1.txt 2>&1 && git apply --check "$PATCH_FILE" >/tmp/n8n_rb_check2.txt 2>&1; then
  printf '{"drill_ok":true,"patch_file":"%s","details":"reverse_and_forward_check_passed"}\n' "$PATCH_FILE"
else
  ERR1=$(cat /tmp/n8n_rb_check1.txt 2>/dev/null | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
  ERR2=$(cat /tmp/n8n_rb_check2.txt 2>/dev/null | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
  printf '{"drill_ok":false,"error":"rollback_drill_failed","reverse_check":"%s","forward_check":"%s"}\n' "$ERR1" "$ERR2"
fi

parameters.jsCode: const base = $('Build Monitoring Registration').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { ...base, snapshot_stage: 'pre_final_hardening', snapshot_branch: $env.DASHBOARD_AUTOMATION_BRANCH || '', snapshot_remote: $env.DASHBOARD_AUTOMATION_REMOTE || 'origin' } }];

nodes.name: Commit Push Snapshot Before Final Approval

parameters.command:
=WORKSPACE='{{$json.workspace_path || '/opt/homebrew/var/www/TKIF_scholarship'}}'
TASK='{{$json.task_id || 'task-' + Date.now()}}'
STAGE='{{$json.snapshot_stage || 'pre_final_approval'}}'
BRANCH='{{$json.snapshot_branch || ''}}'
REMOTE='{{$json.snapshot_remote || 'origin'}}'
if [ ! -d "$WORKSPACE" ]; then
  printf '{"snapshot_ok":false,"error":"workspace_not_found","stage":"%s"}\n' "$STAGE"
  exit 0
fi
cd "$WORKSPACE"
if [ -n "$BRANCH" ]; then
  git checkout "$BRANCH" >/tmp/n8n_git_checkout2.txt 2>&1 || true
fi
CHANGES=$(git status --porcelain)
if [ -z "$CHANGES" ]; then
  CUR=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '')
  SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '')
  printf '{"snapshot_ok":true,"stage":"%s","skipped":true,"reason":"no_changes","branch":"%s","sha":"%s"}\n' "$STAGE" "$CUR" "$SHA"
  exit 0
fi
git add -A >/tmp/n8n_git_add2.txt 2>&1
if ! git commit -m "[n8n:$TASK] checkpoint before $STAGE approval" >/tmp/n8n_git_commit2.txt 2>&1; then
  COMMIT_ERR=$(cat /tmp/n8n_git_commit2.txt | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
  printf '{"snapshot_ok":false,"stage":"%s","error":"commit_failed","details":"%s"}\n' "$STAGE" "$COMMIT_ERR"
  exit 0
fi
CUR=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '')
SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '')
if git push "$REMOTE" "$CUR" >/tmp/n8n_git_push2.txt 2>&1; then
  printf '{"snapshot_ok":true,"stage":"%s","branch":"%s","sha":"%s","push_ok":true}\n' "$STAGE" "$CUR" "$SHA"
else
  PUSH_ERR=$(cat /tmp/n8n_git_push2.txt | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
  printf '{"snapshot_ok":false,"stage":"%s","error":"push_failed","branch":"%s","sha":"%s","details":"%s"}\n' "$STAGE" "$CUR" "$SHA" "$PUSH_ERR"
fi

main.node: Commit Push Snapshot Before Deploy Approval
